betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Large Mining Drill§f

§aThe only machine that can extract bedrock ore — a 7×7×7 pseudo-multiblock for infinite resource mining!§f

The §bLarge Mining Drill§f is a 7×7×7 pseudo-multiblock machine that extracts §bBedrock Ore§f from the bedrock layer. It is the only machine capable of exploiting infinite bedrock ore deposits. It cannot mine depth rock, but it will break blocks in a 3×3 column underneath its center until reaching bedrock.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• §e8×§f Stone Bricks
§b• §e8×§f Steel Ingot
§b• §e8×§f Iron Ingot
§b• §e2×§f Motor
§b• §e1×§f Analog Circuit Board

§6Operation§f:
§b• Power§f: Base consumption of §e10 kHE/t§f.
§b• Speed§f: ~300 seconds per raw bedrock ore with steel drillbit (no speed upgrades).
§b• Drillbit§f: Required to operate. Different tiers available (Steel, High-Speed Steel, Desh, etc.).
§b• Output Port§f: Near the 'miller' part of the machine for automated item output — connect to a Bedrock Ore Processor.

§6GUI Options§f:
§b• Walling§f: Replaces air on the sides of the drilled hole with Sandbags.
§b• Silk Touch§f: Preserves blocks found on the way down.
§b• Crushing§f: Auto-crushes mined blocks.
§b• Vein Mining§f: Mines entire veins of blocks encountered.

§eTip§f: The Large Mining Drill is your key to infinite resources. Use a §bSteel Drillbit§f initially, then upgrade to §bDesh§f for faster operation. Always connect the output to a Bedrock Ore Processor for automated processing!
